programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Follow The Hedgie: Pins, Nettie and their friends are playing 'Follow the Leader' and Pins is 'it'!
It's Time for Monty's Haircut: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Ned and Monty, who are on their way to get Monty's hair trimmed. JoJo finds out what goes on at a dog grooming salon.
It's Time to Mix Colours: JoJo is painting a picture of St Lucia when she runs out of green paint. Gran Gran doesn't have any more green, but she does have yellow and blue.
Potato: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Potato dedicating a song to his uncle Spud, who went on a spaceship to the moon.
Grapes: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's the spectacular acrobatic grapes working together to perform the most difficult structures to perfection.
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.
Isabelle is staying with Oona for the night, and she wants to impress, so they leave the Puffin Burrows to take a midnight journey to see the most amazing sight.
Oona and Baba visit the Undergrowth and discover that a mysterious visitor has been sleeping in everyone's dens.
When a messy jam sandwich disrupts Claudia Moanet's spotless sketchbook page, Doodle Girl finds herself helping the uptight artist to get over a serious case of artist's block.
The Heli-Brush: Mixmups mix up a Colouring In adventure and paint a giant LLB and use a flying Heli-brush to reach the top of the picture.
Otto's Smelly Feet: Otto's stinky feet smell like cheese. Vida helps and everyone is happy except Sunny, who loves cheese!
Juno's Quiet Friend: Vida helps a baby bird who feels too shy to talk.
Pirate Scott Brothers: During Uncle Ian's holiday visit, one of the Scott family's Christmas dreams actually comes true, when Santa needs help repairing a present on Christmas Eve.
Treasure Hunt: The Dream Factory Crew converts the Cruiser into the ultimate treasure hunting machine to track down a very special treasure buried by Principal Pittman.
When Miss Pawdry stows away on a Pioneer camping trip, she leads Mandy and the rest of the Pioneers into the forest and gets them all lost.
When Peter lets Nipper off his lead after promising not to, Nipper runs away. Peter tries to get Nipper back but accidentally scares the dog off the edge of a cliff.
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Bakery to make some deliveries and to bake scones! (SL)
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Percys Duck Dilemma: The only thing Percy loves more than his mail route, lucky bell, and his loc-amigos are Sodor's adorable population of ducks.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: All for the Nest: Exhausted from carrying a heavy load from the Mainland, Bulstrode steers to Brendam Docks, eager for Cranky to help him unload...
Andy And The Arctic Fox: Jen accidentally destroys a video of an Arctic fox hunting, so Andy takes to the skies in his safari-mobile to re-record the action on his gizmo.
Punky discovers that Cranky use to ride horses when she was a young girl.
Foghlaimíonn Hugo agus Sonia ceacht tábhachtach faoina bheith ag roinnt.
Tá Mel ag iarraidh gruaig gach duine eile a chíoradh sula gcíortar a cuid gruaige féin.
Lily tries to teach a group of seals some tricks with a horn she found washed up on a beach, but Salty is not sure it is possible.
Lily finds a pirate's scarf and searches for treasure.
Lá breá gréine i mBaile Gach Aon Lá . . . Ach lá as an ngnáth an lá inniu mar tá criú tagtha chun scannán a dhéanamh ins an baile!
Lá breá gréine eile i mBaile Gach Aon Lá. Tá féile de shaghas éigin ar siúl sa pháirc. Saghas éigin -Féile glasraí?
Oíche Nollag atá ann i mBaile Gach Aon Lá... agus tá Mya Go is a clann ag fanúint ar chuairt ó dhuine thar a bheith speisialta.... San Nioclás!
Nelly and Nora have to get everything indoors before the big storm arrives.
Nora turns Nelly into a sunflower.
When a map goes missing, Kiva, Saul and Angus must find a clever way to reach the finish line.
Sherrod Heron helps The Wee Littles when they realise they don't have a hoop to play basketball but then she needs their help to tie her shoelaces!
Follow The Hedgie: Pins, Nettie and their friends are playing 'Follow the Leader' and Pins is 'it'!
Henry meets a mannequin.
Pirate Scott Brothers: During Uncle Ian's holiday visit, one of the Scott family's Christmas dreams actually comes true, when Santa needs help repairing a present on Christmas Eve.
Treasure Hunt: The Dream Factory Crew converts the Cruiser into the ultimate treasure hunting machine to track down a very special treasure buried by Principal Pittman.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: When Boy and Girl start receiving lavish gifts addressed to `two great kids', Mouse thinks it must be a mistake.
Rooney and Hare have a go at becoming famous, growing the biggest carrot ever seen.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Coal: Nina investigates how coal was made - with the help of Ollie, her smell neuron.
Henry meets a mannequin.
Thart Is Thart: Tá MeMo agus BaBa dul thart agus thart gan stad, ach tagann meadhrán ina gceann agus titeann siad ar an talamh.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Magic Toad: Pixie's ecolo-copter lands on a muddy beach at the exact spot where the first amphibian comes into being. Tiny Toot makes different figures out of the clay soil.
The Butterfly: The caterpillars are pupating among the branches of the flowering bush. Tiny Toot is good at winding string and helps the caterpillars tie knots on their chrysalises.
Happy is really disappointed when the rain ruins his plans for the day.
Helicopter: Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control, so they can all have fun.
Dylan the Gardener wants to make something grow! But growing takes time, so he and his pals need to get creative...
Dylan wants to take a picture of the deepest darkest bottom of the sea, but discovers it's too dark for his camera.
Farmer Daniel gets mad when Margaret knocks down his fence. Daniel learns that it's okay to be angry, but it's never okay to hurt someone.
Sulfur and Phosphorus stand in when they accidentally destroy Nitrogen's scarecrow. They soon find that a local crow is more than a match for them.
Deed encourages a friend to say 'tiger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a stripy tiger, a swimming tiger, a cheeky tiger and Deed even has a tea party with a tiger.
The four adventure-seeking superheroes spring into action when the foghorns from San Francisco's Golden Gate Bridge go missing.
Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!
Astro Tinies: The Astro Heroes are off on an intergalactic mission, and Ollie and Titus think they're ready to take over! But then a wave of disasters hits Attic Town.
Hide & Seek: Cephy is feeling down, he keeps losing the big Attic Town Hide-and-Seek Tournament and doesn't want to play anymore! Ollie and Titus want to help.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Planet Gratitude: While waiting on a customer, Lex and Plu get picky selecting treats.
The Cheerleading Badge: Who brings a team of cheerleaders to a chess match? Duggee does!
The Waiting Badge: How will Duggee and the Squirrels cope with being stuck in a shed for five whole minutes?
While building robots out of recycle materials, Hugo and Sonia learn to work as a team. (SL)
Hugo, Sonia and Mel use their imagination to try to help their family, and when things don't go to plan they discover their biggest super power. (SL)
Joe delivers a blank canvas and it's up to him and Darragh to paint the missing art piece in time for the exhibition. (SL)
The Magic Toad: Pixie's ecolo-copter lands on a muddy beach at the exact spot where the first amphibian comes into being. Tiny Toot makes different figures out of the clay soil.
The Butterfly: The caterpillars are pupating among the branches of the flowering bush. Tiny Toot is good at winding string and helps the caterpillars tie knots on their chrysalises.
Happy is really disappointed when the rain ruins his plans for the day.
Frog Pond: Hooper makes a froggy friend. But when his new pal needs a home, can Hooper find a way to make him one?
Henry meets an ice cream van at the seaside on the hottest day of the year! Everyone wants ice cream to cool them down, but the ice cream man has gone to lunch!
Seaside: Myrtle has taken Sophie and Benjamin to the beach to build sandcastles, but she hasn't quite mastered the art!
Recycling: Stanley builds a crazy-golf course by using all the town's unwanted items. Nothing will go to waste!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: A Crate Rescue: Diesel discovers just because trash isn't seen, it doesn't mean it's not there.
Surgeon is sick. Mouse and Dragon go with her to the mountain top, where a medicinal plant blooms. It proves to be a difficult journey, with someone with an unusual ailment.
Brewster, Maggie and Carrick wonder: Why do we have two eyes but only see one thing? Brewster takes the gang to meet the eyes, Arnie and Arlene.
Helvetica Frog asks: 'Why do mosquitoes bite people?'
Tá Madame Gazelle ag eagrú Dioscó Scátaí do na páistí.
Tá a Muca Guine, 'Ginger' agus 'Brian', tugtha léi ag Madame Gazelle le taispeáint do na páistí. Ceapann na páistí go bhfuil siad go hálainn.
Today is Pyjama Day in Tír na nÓg. Fionn writes a new lullaby. Rúbaí and her friends talk about their favourite toys and Gearóid makes hot chocolate.
Tabhairt Aire Do Baba: Socraíonn May aire a thabhairt do Bhaba fad a bheas Oona ag iascaireacht. Ach tá pleananna May fríd a chéile nuair a aimsíonn Baba gráinneog atá ag geimhriú.
Ar Dhóigh An Phuifín: Míníonn Daidí gurb é an dóigh is fearr le réiteach a fháil ar fhadhb ná machnamh géar a dhéanamh sula mbuaileann tú faoi.
Diva is not happy, she has lost her watch! The gang try and calm her down and find it.
Double Vision: Reggie finds some dinosaur babies.
The presenter travels back in time to the era of the Triceratops, a plant-eating dinosaur which roamed the plains of North America.
Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!
